title: docs: drop legacy balance permission from examples
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tidying the hive's docs
gist.blurb: We've swept through our documentation and examples to reflect the recent merge of the balance permission into usage. Everything is now perfectly up to date and sparkling clean!
gist.summary: Updated documentation, SDK JSDocs, and community app examples to remove the legacy balance permission scope, which has been merged into usage.
gist.impact: Developers will see accurate, up-to-date permission scopes in our API documentation and SDK examples, preventing confusion when configuring app authorization.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot doing some spring cleaning, sweeping up old code snippets while the Nomnom creature eats the deprecated 'balance' permission papers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up old pixelated code snippets with a small broom. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a paper labeled 'BALANCE'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
